Save to Cloud → changes take effect immediately everywhere.
📋 Finance Categories
📌 Single source of truth: Every change here — add, rename, or delete — takes effect immediately across the entire app: Daily Entry dropdowns, Ledger filters, Finance Dashboard, and all saved ledger records.
🔒 = category has linked entries (rename only)  ·  ✏️ = rename  ·  ✕ = delete (empty categories only)
🏢 Company Name
🏪 Shop Name (shown on top bar)
16px

🗄️ Data & Sync
🔄 App Update / Cache
If the app seems to be showing an old version, or a feature doesn't seem to be working, tap below to force-load the latest version.
💾 Full Database Backup
Downloads all tables as one Excel file with separate sheets — Invoices, Finance, Customers, Settings and more.
📥 Export Data
⚠️ Danger Zone
These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.
🖱 Drag Editor
Free Positions mode: enables absolute positioning. Drag elements anywhere on the canvas. Toggle off to return to grid layout. All changes also reflect in Print / PDF.

🔑 Change Password

☁️ Migrate Historical Data to Cloud
Push DAILY_2025, DAILY_2026 & MONTHLY_2026 to Supabase permanently
This will push all historical data from the JS constants into your Supabase finance_ledger table:
• DAILY_2025 — per-day Sheets Cutting & Scrap (2025)
• DAILY_2026 — per-day Sheets Cutting & Scrap (2026)
• MONTHLY_2026 — monthly expenses, income, savings (2026)

Already-uploaded data (MONTHLY_2025) will be skipped automatically.
Preparing... 0 / 0
✅ Migration complete! All data is now in Supabase.
✅ Already migrated. Data is in Supabase. Click Re-run to upload again.
